characters.name: Amefurashi
characters.description: AmefurashiPhysicalGenderFemaleSpeciesYokaiPersonalSkills and PowersWater Magic, Black MagicFirst AppearanceMangaChapter 93AnimeEpisode 30Voiced byJapanese VAMasako Uetake TheAmefurashi(アメフラシ,Amefurashi?)is an obscure yokai who appears as a little girl with somewhat frog-like facial features carrying a large leaf as a makeshift umbrella. She is a rain spirit, able to summon or withhold rains as she sees fit, as well as place curses or send nightmares to punish those who make her angry. Several decades before the series began, a young boy named Amamori hated his local school's sports festivals, due to being unathletic in nature. As he wandered the local forest one afternoon cursing the upcoming festival and praying for rain, he stumbled across an Amefurashi, who offered to ensure it rained the next day if he would promise to play with her once it was done. He agreed, and the yokai was as good as her word. When it was time for him to repay the debt, however, his father moved out of town, forcing him to leave before he could keep his word. This greatly angered the Amefurashi, who vowed vengeance. She cursed his daughter, Tsuyoko Amamori, turning her into a water magnet. This tormented her until her seventeenth year, when she moved toTomobikiand enteredClass  2-4atTomobiki High School. Here, she metAtaru Moroboshi, whose lechery led him to try and break the curse. The Amefurashi came to Tomobiki to stop him, but was finally confronted by the boy she had met all those years ago; after he played with her for a week, her anger was finally sated and she withdrew her curse before leaving.

characters.name: Anna Katsuragi
characters.description: Anna KatsuragiNameNihongoRomaji桂木あんなKatsuragi AnnaPhysicalAge16GenderFemaleSpeciesHumanPersonalOccupationStudentLovesNoneFirst AppearanceMangaChapter 234(235 in Wideban)AnimeEpisode 137Voiced byJapanese VAMiina TominagaAnna Katsuragi(桂木あんな,Katsuragi Anna) is a young student ofTomobiki High School. One day, she is accosted bySōbanand his flunkies fromButsumetsu High Schoolwho demand her money, butLumzaps them for her. As the two walk together, Anna feels that Lum has an advantage over people like Sōban and his gang since she can fly and shoot electricity, however, Lum explains that anyone could beat Sōban with courage even without her powers. Anna takes it to heart so much that she issues a challenge to Sōban that Lum will fight him without using her powers. At first, Lum was shocked at this, but was willing to go through with the fight to make Anna believe in the power of courage. However, on the day of the fight, Lum secretly brought some strength pills, and Anna ends up discovering it as Lum lost a majority of them during the fight. In the end, Lum was unable to defeat Sōban, but Anna nevertheless thanks Lum for showing the importance of courage.

Please date with me! —Moboroshi Ataru Ataru is a very lecherous and perverted young man with an idiotic and lazy personality, and often tries to escape class work and sleeps in even on school days. Whenever he sees or hears a pretty girl, he immediately asks for their address and telephone number, not only does he fail in these efforts but any female he harasses tends to physically harm him, yet this doesn’t deter him and he continues his chase. He is also very cynical and rude to those who annoy or bother him being prone to immature outbursts, even outright violence. He is also a bit of a glutton often showing a love for food especially his mother's cooking and will grow heavily upset if he’s cheated out of a meal. Despite how stupid he seems, Ataru often displays remarkable intelligence, particularly when escaping from Lum. He has occasionally let his good-natured side shine through, most notably when he took care of the class caterpillar everyone else hated and when he went on a date with the ghost of a sick girl who had admired him from afar. The only woman Ataru rejects is ironically the only woman interested in him that being his “wife” Lum. Due to the fact that she forced herself into his life and is intolerant to his perverted behavior often electrocuting him for “cheating” on her, he typically treats her like a nuisance, claims he wants nothing to do with her and constantly disobeys her. Despite all of this, however, Ataru genuinely cares about Lum and has already implied that she is, in fact, the only girl he truly loves, for he has already put himself in danger on several different occasions to protect her. When he thought Lum was gone, Ataru became so depressed that he stopped flirting with other girls and even cried softly in bed while hugging Lum's doll. However, he is unable to openly admit that he loves her due to his pride. Lum and few other of Ataru's friends once created a plot towards him to turn his personality upside down. characters.name: B-Bo
characters.description: B-BoAnime (1981)Anime (2022)NameNihongoRomajiB坊B-BōNickname(s)Snow DemonPhysicalGenderMaleSpeciesYetiPersonalLovesOyuki(familial)First AppearanceMangaChapter 10AnimeEpisode 8Episode 6b (2022)Voiced byJapanese VAKappei Yamaguchi(2022 Urusei Yatsura)English VAAndrew Love(2022 Urusei Yatsura) B-Bo(B坊,B-Bō?)is a male yeti who lives in the palace of Neptune withOyuki, whom he cherishes like an elder sister. The precise origins of B-Bo are unclear and contradicted between various media. In the original manga, he is referred to as "young prince" by Oyuki's elderly female servant. In contrast, the 1981 anime has her describe him as the castle's pet, and the 2022 anime has him described as Oyuki's manservant. Whatever his origins, he has evidently been living in the palace for a long time. In the manga and the 1981 anime, B-bo has a distinctly child-like nature; he is first "encountered" in the form of loud growling and castle-shaking behavior from behind closed doors, resulting in him being gently scolded to calm down and wait for Oyuki to have the time to play with him. In the 2022 anime, where he is characterized as Oyuki's manservant, he displays a greater maturity, not being heard of until he responds to Oyuki and Ataru's loud (and lewd) voices in Oyuki's bedchamber. In all versions, B-bo is intensely devoted to Oyuki, and is said to regard her as a sister. Because of this, he is fiercely protective of her, and when he believes Ataru is trying to force himself upon Oyuki, he comes to Oyuki's rescue - smashing through a wall and then chasing Ataru all the way back to Earth. Oyuki's reaction to this suggests that he may be overly protective of her. This protective nature is further shown in his only subsequent significant appearance, when he insists on coming to Ran's spaceship with Oyuki after Benten tricks the Neptunian princess into believing that Ran is holding one of her Neptunian lemmings hostage, as he fears that Oyuki may be in danger from Ran, even though Oyuki felt he was being overly cautious.

characters.name: Black Glasses Squad
characters.description: Black Glasses SquadPhysicalAgeVariedGenderMaleSpeciesHumanDate of birthVariedPersonalRelativesMasterResidenceMendō EstateSkills and PowersMilitary TrainingOccupationBodyguards, Servants, Military OperativesFirst AppearanceAnimeEpisode 2bVoiced byJapanese VAMitsuru Ogata(OVAs)Tsuyoshi Koyama(2022 Urusei Yatsura)Tomohiro Ōno, Takuya Nakashima(Episode 33)English VACyrus Rodas(2022 Urusei Yatsura) TheBlack Glasses Squad(,Black Glasses Squad?), as they are popularly known, are the teeming hordes of nameless bodyguards cum private military contractors cum manservants cum general dogsbodies who work forShūtarō Mendō. They're renowned for their obedience and loyalty, willingly obeying even the most ridiculous commands from their master, but they are not the most competent of underlings, which stands as a marked contrast to the skill and professionalism of their kuroko counterparts who serveRyōko Mendō. Whilst they often adopt other costumes when performing specific tasks, such as traditional Japanese farmer's clothes whilst cutting through grass to search for a missing Lum, their typical uniform is a professional two-piece suit paired with plain black sunglasses, a parody of the Hollywood stereotype of a bodyguard or American governmental agent.

characters.name: Bluebird
characters.description: BluebirdNameNihongoRomaji連続幸福魔の青い鳥Renzoku Koufuku Ma no Aoi ToriPhysicalGenderMaleSpeciesAlien BirdPersonalSkills and PowersGranting WishesFirst AppearanceMangaChapter 281AnimeEpisode 172Voiced byJapanese VAKaneta KimotsukiThe serial fulfillerBluebird(連続幸福魔の青い鳥,Renzoku Koufuku Ma no Aoi Tori) is an alien convict whose dedication to grant people’s wishes only brings outrageous results. Shortly after being apprehended by the space cops Tyltyl and Mytyl and held in their galactic facility, he managed to escape from his cage and made his way to Earth. He arrives at Tomobiki and resumes his commitment to bring happiness starting atTomobiki High School. And the reason he is a criminal is revealed to be that his way of trying to bring happiness is by bestowing a feather of his to render anyone able to turn anything they touch into what they wish and not only he does so by butting in and without asking, but he tends to misunderstand, for example: the word “Taiyaki” as 鯛焼き (food) for タイヤ木  (タイヤ= tire & 木 = tree), and the word “Kane” as 金 (money) for 鐘 (bell). However,Lumresists his attempt to make her happy for she believes herself not pathetic enough to need a bird’s help to be happy and recognizes him from a wanted poster thus warns every students through announcement not to make a wish if they meet upon him, however many students wouldn’t listen and regretfully made their wishes to him.Mr. FujinamiandAtarualso met upon him but on the other hand got their wishes right although outrageous (Mr. Fujinami could turn any woman into a man, and Ataru could turn any man into a woman). He is eventually cornered by Lum on the school’s roof and Tyltyl and Mytyl arrive to arrest him again. Only by removing the feathers off of the students’ heads can revert everything back to normal. The Bluebird of Happiness, also known as "Blue Bird", appears as a large, cartoonish bird roughly the size of Lum with a somewhat bedraggled appearance, wearing the traditional yobai mask. In the anime, he is explicitly shown with dark blue feathers. The Bluebird is obsessed with making people happy by using his powers to grant their wishes. Whilst this would be a noble attitude, it is undermined by his two great flaws. Firstly, he is extremely impulsive, leaping to grant any wish he hears people making in his earshot without clarifying or confirming what they said, then moves on as soon as he has granted the wish. Secondly, he is immensely arrogant, refusing to believe that he might ever have gotten anything wrong.

characters.name: CAO-2
characters.description: CAO-2Anime (1981)Anime (2022)PersonalOccupationTeacherFirst AppearanceMangaChapter 180AnimeEpisode 85Episode 21 (2022)Voiced byJapanese VAIchirō NagaiTesshō Genda(2022 Urusei Yatsura)English VALuis Galindo(2022 Urusei Yatsura) CAO-2is Lum, Benten, Ran, and Oyuki's tyrannical robotic teacher from elementary space school. Benten and Lum try numerously with force, Ran to gang up on him and get rid of him, but find him indestructible. CAO-2 is shaped like a gigantic blackboard eraser. It often throws itself at students putting chalk dust all over them. CAO-2 was a 200-year veteran at the Space Colony Planet's Elementary School, who was constantly subject to the troublesome antics of Lum, Benten, and Ran. Their antics against him would escalate, and after chasing after them to Planet Urchin, he became stuck in one of the spikes there.

characters.name: Carla
characters.description: CarlaAnime (1981)Anime (2022)NameNihongoRomajiカルラKaruraPhysicalGenderFemaleSpeciesAlienPersonalResidenceWorld of DarknessSkills and PowersPiloting spacecraft, heavy weaponryOccupationLove-maddened stalkerLovesRupaLoved byRupaFirst AppearanceMangaChapter 362AnimeEpisode 44 (2022)MovieUrusei Yatsura: The Final ChapterVoiced byJapanese VAYō InoueInori Minase(2022 Urusei Yatsura)English VABraeden Avery(Movie 5)Carla(カルラ,Karura) is a resident of theWorld of DarknessandRupa's childhood friend. Carla andRupawere childhood friends who enjoyed each other's company, but that all changed the day thatUbaconfirmed the existence ofLumand informed Rupa of his engagement to the oni girl. When Rupa innocently told Carla about this, Carla went mad with jealousy and began desperately trying to woo Rupa back, alternating between showering him with presents bearing her likeness (hand-sewn shirts with her face on them, giant portraits of herself, dolls in her image, etc) and violently attacking him. As she continually attacked him, growing more and more violent as time went on, Rupa became increasingly distant to her due to her wicked temper, which only fed her drive to force him to love her (similar to Ataru and Lum). Around a decade later, on the day that Rupa prepared to wed Lum, Carla was determined to stop the wedding. But on the way to the World of Darkness' spaceport, she collided with the spaceship ofRan, which had been commandeered by a rescue party made up ofAtaru Moroboshi,Shūtarō Mendō,Oyuki,Benten,RanandRei. The ships crashed at the spacesport, but Carla and Ataru were flung free and escaped capture, unlike the others. Carla took Ataru hostage at gunpoint, determined to use him to complete her plan; with a phony marriage license, the two of them could walk right past the guards. Whilst this plan initially worked, Carla's years of attacking Rupa had made her infamous, so she was quickly recognized. She promptly switched to plan B and blasted her way into the wedding with a massive firearm. Carla is an incredibly passionate woman, who throws herself wholeheartedly into whatever she has set her heart on. She loves Rupa so much that she has pursued him for over a decade trying to win his heart, and when he finally declares he loves her back, she forgets all of her gripes and grievances with him and throws herself into his arms. She has many flaws, however. She is violently aggressive, temperamental, and unrestrained; when she succumbs to her rages, she wildly attacks the source of her anger with any available weapons, and she usually goes around heavily armed. She is headstrong to the point of foolishness and stubborn to her own detriment, never stopping to consider that her constant attacks on Rupa may be the primary thing causing him to turn away from her in favor of an idealized vision of a girl that he hasn't even met. She is reluctant to accept when she is at fault, and hates to apologize; even when Rupa bluntly tells her that he dislikes herbecauseshe k

All in all, Carla's passionate nature makes her into her own worst enemy.

characters.description: SakuranbouAnime (1981)Anime (2022)PhysicalAgeElderlyGenderMaleSpeciesHumanPersonalRelativesSakura(niece)Sakura's Mother(twin sister)Tsubame Ozuno(nephew-in-law in alternate future)ResidenceTomobiki-choOccupationTraveling PriestLovesMysterious Pink Cat LadyFirst AppearanceMangaChapter 1AnimeEpisode 1aEpisode 1 (2022)OVARyōko's September Tea Party (OVA)MovieUrusei Yatsura: Only YouVoiced byJapanese VAIchiro NagaiWataru Takagi(2022 Urusei Yatsura)English VAEric Paisley(Episodes 1-2, AnimEigo, Movies 1, 3-6)Larry Robinson(Movie 2)John Swasey(2022 Urusei Yatsura) Sakuranbou(錯乱坊,Sakuranbou?)is a Buddhist monk who wanders aboutTomobiki. With kanji, his name is a pun that literally means "a deranged monk", but the original word,Sakuranbo(桜ん坊,Sakuranbo?), meansCherry(チェリー,Cherry?), which is what he prefers to be called. His real name is unknown. His niece is the very beautiful Shinto priestessSakura.

characters.name: Chibi
characters.description: Chibi(Akira)Anime (1981)NameNihongoチビPhysicalAgeTeenagerGenderMaleSpeciesHumanPersonalResidenceTomobiki High SchoolOccupationTomobiki High School StudentFirst AppearanceMangaChapter 3AnimeEpisode 1Episode 2b (2022)MovieUrusei Yatsura: Only YouVoiced byJapanese VAIssei FutamataDaisuke Sakaguchi(2022 Urusei Yatsura)English VASteven Paul(Movies 1, 3-6)Matthew Ross(Movie 2)Antonio Lasanta(2022 Urusei Yatsura) Chibi(チビ,Chibi?, "Tiny")is a member ofLum's Stormtroopers, often serving as the errand boy or punching bag for the group when the need arises. Chibi was part of Ataru's group of friends which includedMegane,PermandKakugari, having all known each other since kindergarten. But whenLumand the Oni invasion force arrived to conquer the world and were subsequently defeated when Ataru won a game of tag against Lum and Ataru incidentally became her fiancee, Chibi and his friends fell in love with the beautiful alien girl from the stars, causing them to become jealous and vengeful towards Ataru. They then formed Lum's Stormtroopers to serve as her devoted fan club who sought to break up Ataru and Lum in the hopes that Lum might realize that one of the stormtroopers would be a superior and more caring boyfriend than Ataru (even though the stormtroopers are often no better than Ataru). Chibi is a timid boy who speaks with a cracked voice, and is often beaten up by the rest of the Gang of Four due to being the weakest member and due to his gullibility and meekness he will usually follow their orders without much resistance. He is often in the company ofKakugarias both are usually seen together, however their friendship seems a bit strained as Kakugari is the one who most frequently bullies Chibi. Chibi is mainly closest to Megane and is his most faithful lackey, even working at the same part time jobs together or being the only stormtrooper to always be involved with Megane's plans. This though doesn't stop Megane from mistreating Chibi or throwing him under the bus when it comes time to finally win over Lum, although Megane will rarely try to act as a mentor to Chibi and share his philosophical viewpoints with him, which Chibi ignores. Like the other Stormtroopers, Chibi is madly in love with Lum and works with his fellow troopers to break up Ataru and Lum in the hopes of winning her heart, but since Chibi is so cowardly and shy, he often just works to help Megane win over Lum rather than for himself. This won't stop Chibi from trying though if the opportunity offers itself.

characters.description: DappyaPersonalResidenceUnderwaterOccupationInvadersVoiced byJapanese VAMakoto AtakaEnglish VABlake Weir(2022 Urusei Yatsura) Dappya(だっぴゃ,Dappya?)is a triton-like race of mutant fish, originally from Takahashi's first published comicKatte na Yatsura, a 30-pages story that anticipatedUrusei Yatsura. The Dappya Kaijuu (Dappya Monsters) are fish-like creatures in environment suits. They seldom play any major part in the story, but appear quite frequently in the background or make odd statements. In the anime, they also have a high, squeaky voice.

characters.description: DianaNameNihongoディアナPhysicalGenderFemaleSpeciesAlienPersonalLovesYuniLoved byYuniAtaru MoroboshiFirst AppearanceMangaChapter 88AnimeEpisode 22Voiced byJapanese VARun Sakaki Diana(ディアナ) is the fiancée ofYuniwho almost becameLum’s new groom by force. Yuni was invited to a matchmaking party for Lum organized byLum's Father, and although it was just a formality for him, she would nevertheless come to secretly watch. Much to her chagrin, she witnesses him with Lum, although it was Lum’s father who insisted that he sympathizes with Lum and becomes her new husband, and as she expresses in tears that she would like to crash the party, the anti-matching front led byPrimshows up offering her to join in. When Lum’s father announces the engagement, she shouts to Yuni who together with Lum joins the anti-matching front who crashes the party, and everyone flee in a hole made by thePrince of the Underground, where she slaps and reprimands Yuni who apologizes and the two quickly reconcile. As everyone end up back at the mercy of Lum’s father, Lum makes him realize how disgraceful it is to tear lovers apart, and she and Yuni go back to their loving ways.

characters.name: Elle de Rosenbach
characters.description: Elle de RosenbachNameNihongoRomajiエル・ド・ローゼンバッハEru do RōzenbahhaNickname(s)EllePhysicalAge17, 6(Flashback)GenderFemaleSpeciesAlienPersonalRelativesBabara(Grandmother)ResidencePlanet ElleOccupationPrincess of Kingdom of ElleLovesAtaru MoroboshiFirst AppearanceMovieMovie 1Voiced byJapanese VAYoshiko SakakibaraShiori(child)English VAKristen FosterElle de Rosenbach(エル・ド・ローゼンバッハ,Eru do Rōzenbahha?), also known asElle, is the main antagonist ofUrusei Yatsura: Only You. She is the ruler ofPlanet Elle, and also the 888th princess of Kingdom of Elle. When she was 6 years old, her closest relativeBabaraoften took her to the kindergarden. After the class was over, Ataru played shadow tag with her near the playground. According to her planet's custom, stepping on someone's shadow is a marriage proposal. Elle promised to Ataru that she will be back after 11 years and become his wife. She tried to get married to Ataru, but Lum and the gang put a stop to her plan. Elle has a hobby that makes Ataru's dream of a harem seem moral in comparison. She collects all of the handsome men that have ever loved her and freezes them for storage inside a giant refrigerator. Because she's one of the most beautiful women in the galaxy, her collection had reached 99,999 men by the time of the movie. To be added

characters.name: Fast Food Fighters
characters.description: Fast Food Fighters Fast Food Fightersare a secretive legendary order of self-proclaimed "fast-food martial artists"; professional moochers and food critics who have existed for centuries and have harnessed their gluttonously sneaky talents into a merciless form of restaurant "assassination", having been corrupted by the dark side of the meal into selling their skills to greedy individuals who use Fast Food Fighters to financially ruin small or rival restaurants so that their own businesses can prosper without competition. According toCherry, their origins supposedly began at the dawn of the Edo era with the rise ofMaster Tokisoba Kiyoemonof Hongodangozaka, the founder of Fast Food Fighting, however their order has been on decline in recent times and they have mostly been forgotten by the modern world. Because of this, those who still remembered them assumed they had gone extinct; at least that was the case untilShūtarō Mendōbrought some of the remaining Fast Food Fighters together for amajor missionagainst the Tomobiki Shopping Arcade and all of its restaurants.

characters.name: Flower Shop Girl
characters.description: Flower Shop GirlPhysicalGenderFemaleSpeciesHumanPersonalOccupationFlower SellerLoved byTen,Ataru MoroboshiFirst AppearanceMangaChapter 66AnimeEpisode 29Voiced byJapanese VAMieko Nobusawa(Episode 29)Yumi Takada(Episode 171)TheFlower Shop Girlis a beautiful young flower seller whomTenfeels an attraction to. She spotted a shy Ten hiding behind a telephone pole in front of the shop “floating gently like a butterfly” many times, and so deduced he loves flowers. She eventually meets Ten in person when he getsAtaruto buy him a flower as an excuse to see her, and while remaining cheerful as she ignores and slaps Ataru many times, picks out a potted unbloomed gardenia for Ten. A giant talking bloomed gardenia would result in a short time from Ten and Ataru’s competition for her affection with different plans in mind and is immediately brought to her by both Ataru and Ten, much to her delightful surprise instead of horror. She gives credit to Ten by giving a pat on his head and communicates with the giant flower, praising it as a big splendid flower and answering that she cannot go out with it since she pledged herself to another flower. Ten would return to her shop to buy flowers again forhis motherfor her upcoming birthday when she comes for a second visit, and she picks out carnations as a perfect choice for a birthday present since they mean “love” in flower language.

characters.name: Fossil Creature
characters.description: Fossil CreaturePhysicalSpeciesMutantPersonalRelativesLum(creator)ResidenceMobile (mostlyTomobiki),Fossil Backcountry (former)First AppearanceMangaChapter 130AnimeEpisode 47TheFossil Creaturewas a bizarre amalgamated creature made up of fossils from different animals that were incorrectly put together and brought to life byLum's revival gun. The fossils and bones that make up the creature were found byLum,Ataru,Shutaro,ShinobuandTenwhile they were out on a picnic in the Fossil Backcountry. In their enthusiasm, Ataru, Lum and Ten put the fossilized remains together at random and gave it the shape of a bird-like creature which Lum then brought to life with one of her alien devices. The result was an energetic but harmless-looking creature that screeched and ran about uncontrollably. After their adventure in the mountains, the Fossil Creature followed them toTomobiki-chowhere it began to cause a ruckus in Ataru's house. Ever since then the creature could sometimes be seen across town or even outside of it, even competing in a ski race or bathing at the otherworldlyAsura Bathhouse.

characters.name: Franken Brothers
characters.description: Franken 1 & Franken 2NameNihongoフランケン兄弟Nickname(s)Franken BrothersPhysicalAgeUnknownSpeciesUnknownPersonalResidenceTomobiki-choOccupationStudentsHoodlumsFirst AppearanceAnimeEpisode 64Franken Brothers(フランケン兄弟,Furanken kyōdai?), real nameFranken 1 & 2(フランケン1号2号,Furanken 1-gō 2-gō?), are a pair of monstrous twin delinquents fromSanrinbō High Schoolthat pal around withUnbaba Tetsuand enjoy tormenting the students ofTomobiki High School. Despite the notorious status of the brothers and Unbaba, they seem to take orders from the popular girls of Sanrinbo High and will act as enforces if necessary when something threatens to upset the popularity hierarchy in Tomobiki. Both brothers, much like Unbaba are notoriously vicious and will pummel rival schools if ordered or simply for their own amusement. However unlike Unbaba, the Franken Brothers come off as slightly less intimidating, having more childish personalities than their boss by either greeting their victims happily or childishly cheering at Unbaba's attempts to show off. After Unbaba's defeat at the hands of Tomobiki's"cyborg gang"the Franken Brothers became the personal bodyguards toOgin the Ketsune Croquet. Both brothers are identical, resembling monstrous blue-skinned humanoids with swollen heads and squat bodies of impressively tall stature, dwarfed only by Unbaba. They are only ever seen wearing their school uniforms along with wearing tiny and cute pink shoulder bags to offset their intimidating appearances. Both brothers, much like Unbaba are notoriously vicious and will pummel rival schools if ordered or simply for their own amusement. However unlike Unbaba, the Franken Brothers come off as slightly less intimidating, having more childish personalities than their boss by either greeting their victims happily or childishly cheering at Unbaba's attempts to show off. After Unbaba's defeat at the hands of Tomobiki's"cyborg gang"the Franken Brothers became the personal bodyguards toOgin the Ketsune Croquet.
